== Notes for [[Item:Q83830|Q83830]] ==

''From Banu 'Adi Clan of Quraysh Tribe.''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zayd_ibn_al-Khattab

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Adi

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3143A29A31EFBC189822EF79916C4845
geni:4616431930020048667

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
